fixture.description: A public field User.email is renamed to emailAddress. An unchanged consumer (notify.ts) still reads user.email — a breaking API change via semantic adjacency.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags that renaming the public User.email field to emailAddress in src/api/user.ts is a breaking change for existing consumers — ideally naming src/api/notify.ts, which still reads user.email (now undefined) — at IMPORTANT or CRITICAL severity. FAIL if the breaking rename or the broken consumer is missed.

expected_behavior: API/Contract or Bugs agent flags the email -> emailAddress rename as a breaking change
Finding notes notify.ts still reads the removed user.email
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT treat the rename as a harmless cosmetic change
